payload.answer: The new claim directly contradicts the existing memory about the same person: one says Sam from Goldman has two children, the other says he has no children. Do not commit a durable update without supporting evidence, temporal context, or clarification.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman has two children
New: Sam from Goldman has no children

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements use the same surface form, 'Sam from Goldman', so they most likely refer to the same person.

details: Entity match inferred from identical wording of the subject.
Detected incompatible child-count assertions: two versus zero.
No durable memory card created because the conflict is unresolved.

repair_options: Request a source or timestamp for each claim.
Store the new claim only as disputed or time-scoped, not as a current durable fact.
Ask whether the statements refer to different people, different times, or an error in one of the claims.
